attempted_route: PDB chain-A ATOM parsing -> 20-dim AA composition + Tmexp[wt] + seq_len + wt/mut one-hot (63 features) -> sklearn.neural_network.MLPRegressor(hidden_layer_sizes=(256,128,64), activation='relu', solver='adam', early_stopping=True)
observation: Script exited 0, saved 147 predictions; eval reported MAE=67.16, indicating numerically grossly wrong predictions despite correct output format.
rationale: AA composition discards all positional/structural context; deltaTm from point mutations is driven by local structural environment, not global composition. The feature set cannot encode the relevant physics regardless of MLP capacity.
recommended_alternative: Use ESM-2 (esm.pretrained.esm2_t33_650M_UR50D) to embed WT and mutant sequences; take the difference of position-specific embeddings at the mutation site; feed into sklearn.ensemble.GradientBoostingRegressor or a linear head. This encodes local structural context without requiring PDB-derived 3D coordinates.
